name: run_query
description: Execute an FQL (Fauna Query Language) query against your Fauna database. FQL is a TypeScript-like language that supports reading, writing, filtering, joining, aggregating, and complex transactional logic in a single query. This is the most powerful and flexible way to interact with Fauna.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: The FQL query string to execute. Uses Fauna's v10 query language syntax.

parameters.name: arguments
parameters.description: Named arguments to pass into the query for parameterized queries. Prevents injection and improves caching.

parameters.name: X-Format
parameters.description: Response format: 'simple' for plain JSON (default), 'tagged' for type-annotated JSON with Fauna type information.

parameters.name: X-Typecheck
parameters.description: Set to 'true' to enable type checking on the query before execution.

body.static_type: Set<{ name: String, price: Double, category: String }>
